name: Heavy Armor Master
summary: You can use your armor to deflect strikes that would kill others. You gain the following benefits:

documentBlocks.text: You can use your armor to deflect strikes that would kill others. You gain the following benefits:

items: Increase your Strength score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
While you are wearing heavy armor, bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage that you take from nonmagical attacks is reduced by 3.

abilityIncrease.description: Increase your Strength score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

highlights: Increase your Strength score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
While you are wearing heavy armor, bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage that you take from nonmagical attacks is reduced by 3.
